children.text: Give your mind a stretch! Stay active and earn watts for a chance to win a subscription to Headspace (guided meditation app), and other fun prizes. Earn watts by checking in at a higi station near you (higi.com/locator), and by connecting your fitness apps/devices to your higi account at higi.com/settings/apps and being active.
Individual points challenge. Unlimited points per day.
Grand Prize (1) - 2-year subscription to Headspace meditation app, a Fitbit Alta HR, and a yoga mat
winner chosen randomly from those with 2500+ points
Mountain Prizes (5) - 1-year subscription to Headspace meditation app and a higi Stress Ball
5 winners chosen randomly from those with 2000+ points
Lotus Prizes (10 winners) - 1-month subscription to Headspace meditation app
10 winners chosen randomly from those with 1500+ points
Tom you need to rest you have a door good.
1039 so far. taking the day off to rest these old bones!
